summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The W B Yeats is a cruise ferry built by Flensburger Schiffbau-Gesellschaft mbH & Co. KG, with a gross tonnage of 51,388gt and a length of 194.8m. It has a beam of 31.6m and a height from keel to deck 13 of 38.9m. The vessel is powered by four MaK 8M43C medium speed engines producing 8,000kW at 500rpm, with two Siemens GVL 1700 gearboxes and twin 5.4m propellers.

items.value_text: Flensburger Schiffbau Gesellschaft mbH & Co. KG
FSG / OSK ShipTech (Interior) / Minima, Ireland (Colour, Restaurant)

items.display_name: sister ships already completed (excluding ship presented)
I high. There are two ramps
items.value_text: one at the stern and one at capacity spread over four decks allowing for 486 cars and 187 trailers. Passenger capacity is 1,800 and in keeping with its cruise ferry status there are 435 cabins including 177 superior exterior cabins with private balconies. Other facilities include restaurants, shops and a cinema. When ordered in 2016, reports suggested the vessel would be ice-classed but the DNV GL notations given on delivery of the vessel in December do not confirm this quartet of MaK 8M43C medium speed engines each producing 8,000kW at 500rpm. Transmission to the twin 5.4m propellers is through two Siemens GVL 1700 gearboxes. Auxiliary power comes from four MaK 8M20C gensets each producing 1,520kW. All engines can run on HFO as the vessel is fitted with an Alfa Laval hybrid scrubber system

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
